title: armeria maritima var. pseudarmeria
intro: Armeria maritima var. pseudarmeria, also known as thrift or sea pink, is a low-growing, perennial plant native to Europe. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. pseudarmeria include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Armeria maritima var. pseudarmeria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
